data.title: RefrigiWear launches Winter Work Boot Buyer's Guide to help shoppers choose the right protection for extreme cold.
data.description: In Dahlonega, Georgia, on January 30, 2026, RefrigiWear, a top producer of insulated industrial workwear and personal protective gear for harsh cold conditions, unveiled its latest Winter Work Boot Buyer's Guide. This extensive consumer resource offers valuable information to assist buyers in selecting the right winter work boots.

data.title: Borr Drilling to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 18 after NYSE close; details in webcast and call.
data.description: The company Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) based in Hamilton, Bermuda, is set to announce its Q4 2025 financial results post the market close on February 18, 2026. The release will occur after trading hours on the New York Stock Exchange. This disclosure is eagerly awaited by investors and financial analysts to evaluate the company's performance during the mentioned period. The Company expects this data to provide insights into its trajectory and may influence investor decisions.

data.title: AHF protests cuts to Florida's ADAP program at two locations on Jan 30, 2026, 10:30am. Stand against elimination of HIV/AIDS care.
data.description: Advocates from AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) are protesting proposed cuts to Florida’s AIDS Drug Assistance Program (ADAP) by organizing simultaneous protests in Orlando and St. Petersburg. The protests will occur on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 10:30am ET. In St. Petersburg, it will be held at 205 Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Street North, and in Orlando at 932 W. Central Blvd. Their aim is to oppose the cuts impacting the program and advocate for the  importance of ADAP for individuals with HIV/AIDS in Florida.

data.title: PRA Group (Nasdaq: PRAA) opening Uptown Charlotte office in Feb 2026, located in One South tower.
data.description: A prominent company known as PRA Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: PRAA), specializing in acquiring and managing nonperforming loans, is planning to inaugurate a new office in Uptown Charlotte in early February 2026. This office will be situated in the iconic One South building, a 40-story office tower positioned at the junction of Trade and Main streets.

data.title: Raken adds two technology industry veterans to its Board of Directors for growth phase. Ron Antevy and Robert E. Knowling Jr. join.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Raken, a prominent construction management platform, revealed the expansion of its Board of Directors. The board welcomes Ron Antevy and Robert E. Knowling Jr., both highly experienced in the technology sector. This move is anticipated to bring valuable expertise to the company's leadership team.

data.title: Florida Attorney Dan Newlin commits $1 million bet on football game to support Pediatric Cancer Research at Nemours Children's Hospital.
data.description: Renowned Florida Attorney Dan Newlin made a significant announcement at a press conference in Orlando, Florida on January 30, 2026. He pledged to donate the proceeds from an extraordinary $1 million bet to Nemours Children's Hospital. This generous commitment showcases Newlin's dedication to supporting the hospital's important work.

data.title: Tompkins Finl (AMEX: TMP) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 5%, EPS $1.78 vs. $1.7. Revenue up $12.53M from last year.
data.description: Tompkins Financial Corporation (AMEX: TMP) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 9:00 AM. The results surpassed expectations, with an EPS of $1.78 beating the estimated $1.7 by 5.0%. Revenue saw a notable increase of $12.53 million compared to the previous year. data.title: AEO software category on G2 grew by over 2000%, with 150+ products in 10 months. More B2B buyers start search with AI chatbots.
data.description: In a span of 10 months, the answer engine optimization category at G2 expanded significantly to encompass over 150 products, leading to its inclusion in the company's 2026 Winter Reports. G2, a renowned software marketplace based in Chicago, revealed this development on Jan. 30, 2026. This growth marks a significant milestone for G2, establishing it as a key player in the industry.

data.title: VinFast VF 9 luxury car prioritizes calm over speed and engine noise. Launching on Jan 30, 2026 in Irvine, California.
data.description: In Irvine, California, on January 30, 2026, it was highlighted that individuals often seek tranquility over speed and noise when starting their day. This desire for peace and calm before facing the day is reflected in the moment when one leaves the garage and closes the door, wishing for quietness instead of the usual sounds of a roaring engine. This sentiment underscores the importance of finding stillness and serenity in the midst of a bustling day, emphasizing the value of a peaceful start to one's routine. It showcases a yearning for a moment to collect thoughts and gather composure before diving into daily activities, highlighting the significance of embracing moments of quietude amidst the busyness of life.

data.title: Vaulted Deep honored at Wichita Business Journal Innovation Awards for waste management and carbon removal work.
data.description: Vaulted Deep, a waste management and carbon removal company based in Wichita, Kansas, has been honored at the 2026 Wichita Business Journal Innovation Awards for its long-term commitment to the community. The company was selected as an honoree for this prestigious award, highlighting its valuable contributions. This recognition underscores Vaulted Deep's role as a reliable community partner. The award ceremony took place on January 30, 2026, showcasing the company's dedication to innovation and sustainability. This acknowledgment underscores Vaulted Deep's positive impact, showcasing their commitment to advancing environmental solutions.

data.title: Hunter Nation presents Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry with highest award for protecting future of hunting in America.
data.description: The highest honor in America for individuals who support and promote the future of hunting has been awarded to a grassroots organization. In a press release dated January 30, 2026, Hunter Nation, the top grassroots hunting advocacy group in the country, revealed that they have officially bestowed the award upon a recipient.
